title: Conditional Color Coding
excerpt:
Hello, 
I need to add a conditional color coding for rows. If a row is within 10 days of a due date I need it to turn yellow. Should I do a formula or something else? What would that look like? Thanks

posts.author: gabrielledagosta (Gabrielle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I need to add a conditional color coding for rows. If a row is within 10 days of a due date I need it to turn yellow. Should I do a formula or something else? What would that look like? Thanks

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Do a formula first off to return the # that you’re looking for. Then you’ll need do another coumn with a ‘yes’ or ‘no’. Then using conditional coloring to highlight the row
